claim: AI agents can extract real inventory data, pricing, and VIN numbers from dealership websites without hallucinations
actionable: Trust AI agents to scrape and process real-world structured data when properly scoped

claim: AI agents can autonomously set up ad campaigns with proper geo-targeting and without user login
actionable: Use browser-controlling agents to automate digital advertising setup without API integration

claim: Y Combinator is investing in AI-fulfilled agencies where AI does most client work
actionable: Consider building service businesses where AI agents handle client fulfillment
